rationale: In the citing paper, Libai et al. (2013) appears as part of an early motivation statement that firms use seeding strategies, alongside other broad references on diffusion and networks. The citing paper does not use Libai et al.'s acceleration-versus-expansion decomposition, customer-equity valuation framework, or simulation setup in its model development, estimation, or empirical interpretation. The citation functions as general background support for the importance of seeding rather than a specific intellectual building block.
